title: MediaMemoryRecord
description: One record per media item stored in media-memory/. Append-only in metadata.jsonl. Mirrored into ChromaDB as the source of truth for the vector index.

id.description: UUIDv4. Used as the ChromaDB document ID.

filename.description: Original filename as provided by the user (or a synthesized name for url/base64 inputs).

stored_path.description: Path relative to repo root where the file lives on disk.

type.description: High-level category inferred from MIME type.

source.description: Where this asset came from: user_upload, generated, web_download, screenshot, export, or a specific tool name.

description.description: Natural-language description. Provided by the caller or auto-generated with Gemini multimodal.

extracted_text.description: OCR for images/PDFs, transcript for audio/video, raw content for text files. Empty if none.

tags.description: Semantic tags. Lowercase, short. Auto-suggested by Gemini when not provided.

embedding_model.description: Model used to embed the semantic document, e.g. 'gemini-embedding-001'.

embedded.description: Whether a vector was successfully written to ChromaDB.

extra.description: Free-form caller-supplied metadata (tool name, conversation turn, generation params, etc.).
